testcase.name: test_run_tests[down-1000-3-3]

failure.message: TypeError: object of type 'coroutine' has no len()

testcase.failure:
test_type = 'down', bytes_to_xfer = 1000, iteration_count = 3, expected_len = 3
@pytest.mark.parametrize( 'test_type, bytes_to_xfer, iteration_count, expected_len', [ ('down', 1000, 3, 3), ('up', 1000, 5, 5), ('invalid', 1000, 2, 0), ], ) def test_run_tests(test_type, bytes_to_xfer, iteration_count, expected_len): with patch('cf_speedtest.speedtest.download_test', return_value=(1000, 0.1)), \ patch('cf_speedtest.speedtest.upload_test', return_value=(1000, 0.2)):
results = speedtest.run_tests( test_type, bytes_to_xfer, iteration_count, ) > assert len(results) == expected_len ^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: object of type 'coroutine' has no len()
tests/speedtest_test.py:25: TypeError

testcase.name: test_output_file

failure.message: AssertionError: expected call not found. Expected: open('test_output.csv', 'w') Actual: not called.

testcase.failure:
mock_time = <MagicMock name='time' id='4402605632'>
def test_output_file(mock_time): output_file = 'test_output.csv'
with patch('cf_speedtest.speedtest.run_standard_test') as mock_run_test, \ patch('builtins.open', create=True) as mock_open: mock_run_test.return_value = { 'download_speed': 100000000, 'upload_speed': 50000000, 'download_stdev': 1000000, 'upload_stdev': 500000, 'latency_measurements': [10, 20, 30], 'download_measurements': [90000000, 100000000, 110000000], 'upload_measurements': [45000000, 50000000, 55000000], }
speedtest.main(['--output', output_file])
> mock_open.assert_called_with(output_file, 'w')
tests/speedtest_test.py:127: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <MagicMock name='open' id='4402600592'>, args = ('test_output.csv', 'w') kwargs = {}, expected = "open('test_output.csv', 'w')", actual = 'not called.' error_message = "expected call not found.\nExpected: open('test_output.csv', 'w')\n Actual: not called."
def assert_called_with(self, /, *args, **kwargs): """assert that the last call was made with the specified arguments.
Raises an AssertionError if the args and keyword args passed in are different to the last call to the mock.""" if self.call_args is None: expected = self._format_mock_call_signature(args, kwargs) actual = 'not called.' error_message = ('expected call not found.\nExpected: %s\n Actual: %s' % (expected, actual)) > raise AssertionError(error_message) E AssertionError: expected call not found. E Expected: open('test_output.csv', 'w') E Actual: not called.
/opt/anaconda3/envs/SWA_Rep2/lib/python3.14/unittest/mock.py:976: AssertionError
